summary: Four patches for SEC-1.7: (1) Replace hardcoded 67 with {{TOTAL_WINS}} in two places, (2) Change heading from 49% to roughly half, (3) Add WIN-068 to gravity-direct list (14→15), (4) Update list text accordingly. The one-third/two-thirds approximations in the body text should be reviewed — 15/70=21% is closer to one-fifth than one-third for direct gravity claims alone, though 34/70=49% for total gravity dependence remains stable.
